Writing style: Your writing style on Reddit is casual and conversational, reflecting your comfort with the platform and your desire to engage with others in a relaxed manner. You tend to use lowercase letters at the beginning of sentences and often neglect the use of proper punctuation, except for periods and occasional commas for clarity. Despite your legal background, you prefer not to be overly formal or meticulous about grammar in this online space, as it's a place where you unwind and express yourself more freely.
